LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AND RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS GRANTED. A WRIT OF ATTACHMENT FOR $51,145.52 IS ISSUED. PLAINTIFFS HAVE SATISFIED THEIR BURDEN OF SHOWING A COMMERCIAL CONTRACTUAL CLAIM, THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF THAT CLAIM, AND AN ASCERTAINABLE SUM THAT IS OWED. EVEN THOUGH PLAINTIFFS RESIDED AT THE PREMISES, PLAINTIFFS PROPERLY CHARACTERIZE THE PARTIES' CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP AS ARISING FROM A COMMERCIAL REHABILITATION AND MANAGEMENT CONTRACT. PLAINTIFFS SHALL POST A $10,000 BOND. (COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER MIRRORING THE COURT'S RULING AND EMAIL TO COURT- COPYING OPPOSING COUNSEL- FOR SIGNATURE). JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

Plaintiff'S Application For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment And Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: RICHARD JOHNS, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF RICHARD JOHNS, 415.781.8494, FOR PLAINTIFF NICK GRAY.
CURTIS DOWLING, ESQ., DOWLING & MARQUEZ, 415.495.8500, FOR DEFENDANT MARGARET NARRON.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Plaintiff'S Application For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment And Right To Attach Order is granted. A writ of attachment for $51,145.52 is issued. Plaintiffs have satisfied their burden of showing a commercial contractual claim, the probable validity of that claim, and an ascertainable sum that is owed. Even though plaintiffs resided at the premises, plaintiffs properly characterize the parties' contractual relationship as arising from a commercial rehabilitation and management contract. Plaintiffs shall post a $10,000 bond. (counsel for plaintiff to prepare a form of order mirroring the court's ruling and email to court- copying opposing counsel- for signature). Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
